text:
Created attachment 186157
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

Ver. 1.6.15 was released in 2017-09-04.

added support for EP-710A Series, EP-810A Series and EW-M970A3T Series.
end of support for ET-2610 Series, L3050 Series, L3060 Series and L3070 Series.
